description: Unit test class for testing the /api/me endpoint in the BusinessLoanAPI Spring Boot application. It validates correct behavior for authorized and unauthorized requests, including JWT parsing and validation.

classes.name: test_me_controller_webmvc_test
classes.description: Test class for the MeController, verifying JWT-based authentication and responses for /api/me endpoint.

methods.name: me_withoutAuth_is401
methods.description: Test that accessing /api/me without an Authorization header returns 401 Unauthorized.

methods.name: me_withAuth_is200
methods.description: Test that a valid JWT token allows access to /api/me and returns user subject and authorities.

methods.name: me_withInvalidJwt_is401
methods.description: Test that an invalid JWT token results in a 401 Unauthorized response.
